overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a rural village at sunset. The scene features dramatic red-orange lighting, wooden medieval structures with red banners, and dirt paths surrounded by vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: village market entrance with wooden stalls and red banners

events.description: sun becomes visible on the horizon, shifting from diffused to backlit lighting

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through the village market area, approaching the wooden archway

entered.detail: wooden market structure with red fabric canopy and triangular pennant flags
tall wooden frame structure with hanging red banners and multiple levels
small village building with straw thatched roof
simple wooden post and rail fence lining the dirt path
tall wooden portal frame with hanging triangular banners

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a village market area at dusk, passing wooden stalls with red banners. The path is lined with wooden fences and leads toward a large wooden archway structure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside path with wooden archways and sunset view

events.description: passing under the first wooden archway into open countryside
passing under the second wooden archway

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking along the winding dirt path as the landscape opens up to reveal the setting sun ahead

entered.detail: bright orange sun low on horizon creating strong lens flare and red sky
tall wooden pole with multiple lantern fixtures
wooden frame structure with hanging triangular pennant banners
dense tall yellow-green grass and vegetation lining the path

segments.scene_description: Passing under the first archway, the scene opens into wide countryside with the sun directly ahead. Geralt walks through tall grass toward a second wooden archway as the sky glows deep red-orange.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural trail with dense vegetation and multiple wooden archways

events.description: passing under the third wooden archway
vegetation becomes denser on both sides of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the path as it curves slightly, approaching additional wooden archways in the distance

entered.detail: wooden portal with hanging banners, passed midway through segment
distant wooden frame structure with triangular flags silhouetted against sunset
simple wooden resting bench beside the dirt path
thick bushes and tall grass creating a more enclosed feeling

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the rural path, Geralt passes under the third archway and approaches a fourth. The vegetation grows denser on both sides, and the sun sits low on the right horizon, casting long shadows across the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined village market into an expansive, sun-drenched rural landscape. It begins with Geralt walking past wooden stalls and red banners along a fenced path that leads toward a distant wooden archway. As he passes under this first structure, the scene opens into wide countryside where the sky glows deep red-orange and the path cuts through tall grass toward a second archway. The journey continues along the rural trail, passing under a third archway as the vegetation grows denser on both sides. Finally, the camera approaches a fourth archway while the sun sits low on the right horizon, casting long shadows across the dirt path.
